concerns: GitHub Projects V2 status transition requires field ID and option ID — planner must read github.ts to understand existing gh CLI patterns and determine if field/option IDs need dynamic fetch or can be hardcoded
Linear transitionIssue requires workflow state IDs — planner must read linear.ts for existing patterns
Daemon does NOT currently subscribe to Envoy for worker-done events — new subscription needed in index.ts
Auto-progression Envoy trigger: daemon needs to subscribe to notifications.role.legion-controller or a new dedicated topic
Health tick fallback already in place via fetchAndProcessState() — auto-progression just needs to hook into post-collection processing
Race condition safe: hasLiveWorker check + 409 from POST /workers handles concurrent triggers
keyDecisions: advance reuses existing POST /workers dispatch logic via new POST /state/advance endpoint
IssueTracker interface extended with transitionIssue() and removeLabel() for transition_to_* actions
Auto-progression is opt-in via LEGION_AUTO_ADVANCE=true env var
Envoy fast path + periodic poll fallback for auto-progression trigger
--stage flag on advance is equivalent to dispatch --force
